c.d: The number and types of photo effects and filters available, including artistic, vintage, and AI-powered options.
c.s: App Store, Google Play Store, PCMag

c.d: The ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's interface for applying effects and editing photos.
Availability of advanced features like layers, curves, HSL adjustments, and masking for precise control over effects.
Presence of a social community for sharing photos, discovering new effects, and getting inspiration.
Integration of AI for automatic adjustments, object removal, style transfer, and other intelligent effects.
Availability of the app on iOS, Android, and other platforms (e.g., desktop, web).
c.s: App Store, Google Play Store, PCMag

c.d: Cost of the app and its features, including free options, subscriptions, and in-app purchases.
c.s: Zapier, App Store, Google Play Store

c.d: Compatibility with various image formats, including RAW, JPEG, and PNG.
The ability to create and save custom filters and effects for consistent editing.
The ability to directly share to social media, or integrate with other apps
